title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Medical Devices used in the Cardiovascular System Agenda April 8, 2022 - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Medical Devices used in the Cardiovascular System Agenda April 8, 2022
Location: Virtual Date & Time: April 8, 2022, 1:00 pm – 4:00 pm EST Participants: SAC-MDUCS members, observers, guest speakers, Health Canada staff
1:00 – 1:10 Opening remarks David Boudreau (Director General, Medical Devices Directorate (MDD))
1:10 – 1:20 Review of the agenda and declaration of affiliations and interests Dr. John Ducas (Chair)
1:20 – 1:30 Summary of previous advice used and general considerations for the meeting Kevin Day (MDD)
1:30 – 2:30 Left atrial appendage occlusion devices Dr. Jacqueline Saw (Guest speaker)
2:30 – 3:45 Leadless pacemakers Dr. Raymond Yee (Committee Member) 3:45 – 4:00 Next steps, closing remarks and adjournment of meeting Dr. John Ducas (Chair)
